meaning: n.后院,后庭,<美>(住宅的)场院
examples: We found a man nosing around in our backyard.
He had an assemblage of old junk cars filling the backyard.
The kids were playing leapfrog and doing somersaults in the backyard.
The master suite is on the main floor, overlooking the pool and private, fenced backyard.
Ellison has triumphed over bigger foes, and he supposedly wants the cup in his backyard.
